name: orchestration-strategy
description: Evaluate multi-task workloads and choose solo, parallel, sequential, or team-based execution.

interface.shortDescription: Choose the right execution strategy for multi-task coding work.
interface.longDescription: Orchestration Strategy analyzes task count, dependencies, file overlap, and communication needs to select a cost-efficient execution strategy. It uses generic host-aware delegation language so it can guide both Claude Code and Codex workflows.
defaultPrompt: Choose an execution strategy for this plan.
Can these tasks run in parallel?
Review this backlog for file overlap.
